pr.title: Non-record: Depth Recurrence 5x3 — Weight-Shared Looping Transformer (6xH200, val_bpb=1.2716)

output.summary: Weight-shared Transformer loops 5 unique layers thrice with loop embeddings/gates and wider dim to trade parameters for effective depth recurrence.
techniques: Weight-shared loops to reuse 5 layers over 3 passes
Loop embeddings and gates to distinguish and control repeated passes
Wider model dim after sharing params to maintain capacity
